command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.191 "cat /etc/cloudflared/config.yml 2>/dev/null || cat /root/.cloudflared/config.yml 2>/dev/null || cat /home/jose/.cloudflared/config.yml 2>/dev/null || find /etc /home/jose -name config.yml -path *cloudflared* 2>/dev/null | head -3"
